name: Spicy Okra/Basmati Rice/Black Beans
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium-sized saucepan, sauté the onions and tomatoes in the oil for 5 minutes.
2. Add the okra, garlic, salt, pepper, and bouillon cube to the pan.
3. Cook for 15 to 20 minutes until all ingredients are well combined and heated through.
4. Serve hot over the rice and beans.
